name: Customer Story → Testimonial Draft
description: Turns what a happy customer told you into a clean testimonial and a short case story you can use in your marketing. Captures the win while it is fresh instead of letting a great quote disappear into your inbox.
prompt_template: Using the customer feedback or story I point you to in my brain or email, draft a short testimonial in the customer's voice and a brief before-and-after story I can put on my site or share. Keep the wording natural and avoid overselling. Also draft a short note asking the customer to approve the testimonial. Give me all of it as drafts to review.
